title: Effect of Socio-environmental Factors on Rats Proliferation and Leptospira Transmission in Suburban Areas of Dungun, Terengganu - Malaysia
author: Mohammad Izuan Mohd Zamri
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This study attempts to evaluate the effect of different socio-environmental variables on the proliferation of rats and  Leptospira  in suburban areas of Dungun, Terengganu, Malaysia. We performed ten trapping sessions    between April 2021 and January 2022, and  captured 89 rodents from five species during the study. We tested the captured animals for  Leptospira  bacteria using PCR detection
steps_raw: This study attempts to evaluate the effect of different socio-environmental variables on the proliferation of rats and  Leptospira  in suburban areas of Dungun, Terengganu, Malaysia.
